name: ZX Spectrum — Hello World (C, z88dk)
description: Write ZX Spectrum 48K programs in C. z88dk's zcc compiles main.c (sccz80) and links it against the bundled +zx runtime (crt0 + zx_clib + the console driver) entirely in the browser; the IDE wraps the result into a 48K .sna that boots on the chips ZX core. printf prints to the screen and zx_border tints the frame.
